rationale: policyOverride: JSON arg added to effectivePolicy and explainPolicy resolvers; routes through new effective_policy_with_plan/explain_policy_with_plan paths; null preserves active-policy behavior; malformed input returns typed invalid_policy_override extension with diagnostics; four targeted unit tests added covering schema exposure, null vs override, allow→deny flip, and malformed-error path.

findings.summary: explainPolicy with policyOverride supplied but no collection (neither top-level nor in operations[]) returns InvalidArgument rather than an invalid_policy_override diagnostic — reasonable, but not the typed code AC3 specifies. Existing UI paths always send a collection so this is unlikely to surface.
No top-level explainPolicyDryRun resolver exists in the schema; dry-run is expressed via the dryRun field on entity mutations, so the bead's optional 'dry-run variant' clause is N/A.
AC5 (clippy clean) and AC6 (Playwright e2e green) were not re-verified in this review; relying on the merged execution attempt's reported success (task_succeeded, exit_code=0).
